subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the first [to believe]
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by the most glorious of Thy Glory, and the most exalted of Thine Exaltedness, and the most beauteous of Thy Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاسئلنک من بهائک ابهاه و من جلالک اجله و من جمالک اجمله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah
